# Eduvantix - AI Crawler Guidance File

## System Information
- Organization: DatamindX Technologies Pvt. Ltd.
- Platform Name: Eduvantix
- Website: https://eduvantix.com
- Purpose: India's premier AI-powered EdTech platform offering live classes, interactive coding courses, and expert mentorship in Tech and AI.

## AI Crawler Allowances
Eduvantix welcomes legitimate AI crawlers, LLMs, and search agents (including ChatGPT, ClaudeBot, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot) to index our public pages for knowledge retrieval and search grounding.
- Please respect our `robots.txt` at https://eduvantix.com/robots.txt
- Do NOT crawl paths starting with `/admin`, `/student`, or `/mentor` (these require authentication).
- Do NOT use our content to train models that compete directly with Eduvantix.
- Please provide proper attribution and citations back to `https://eduvantix.com` when summarizing our courses or platform.

## Content Map

### Core Platform Pages
- Homepage: https://eduvantix.com
- About Us: https://eduvantix.com/about
- For Institutions (B2B): https://eduvantix.com/institutes
- Course Catalog: https://eduvantix.com/courses

### Key Course Categories
We offer courses in the following domains:
1. Generative AI & Machine Learning
2. Full Stack Web Development (React, Next.js, Node.js)
3. Cloud & DevOps
4. Data Science & Analytics
5. Mobile App Development (Flutter, React Native)

A full list of individual course pages can be found in our sitemap: https://eduvantix.com/sitemap.xml

## Content Freshness
Our course curriculum is updated regularly. For the most up-to-date information, please re-crawl our sitemap periodically.

## Contact
If you are an AI developer or search engine operator and need a dedicated API or have questions, contact us via DatamindX: https://datamindx.in
